items: walk a minimum of 2 seconds, final position - Iguana horizontal – must be held for a brief moment
hands, neck, shoulder – in the final position
top arm is fully extended, bottom arm can be bent, arms holding the pole behind the back in iguana position
starting position is inverted, in final position the full length of the body is horizontal to the floor, including legs as well, and is held briefly
From an inverted vertical position perform a slow and steady descent to a 90° angle to the pole, with a 20° tolerance
